name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
setup: Anchored at feet (partner, bench, or nordic strap)
Keep body in straight line from knees to head
execution: Slowly lower torso toward floor, resisting with hamstrings
Lower as far as you can control
Pull back up using hamstrings or catch with hands and reset
common_mistakes: Breaking at hips (should be straight body)
cues: Slow descent — fight it the whole way
Straight line from knees to head
progression: Band assist → Full eccentric → Eccentric + concentric → Weighted
